title: Game farms in the Mossel Bay area
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Game farms, also known as...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Game farms, also known as game reserves or wildlife ranches, are areas of land designated for the conservation and management of various species of wild animals.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Game farms, also known as game reserves or wildlife ranches, are areas of land designated for the conservation and management of various species of wild animals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These areas are specifically maintained to protect and preserve wildlife, often with a focus on endangered or threatened species.","html":"These areas are specifically maintained to protect and preserve wildlife, often with a focus on endangered or threatened species."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Mossel Bay area boasts a number of game ranches, reserves, lodges and safari camps."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Make it fun visiting a game farm in the Mossel Bay area:","html":"Make it fun visiting a game farm in the Mossel Bay area:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Hartenbos Private Game Lodge - 079 675 2718• Gondwana Private Game Reserve - 021 555 0807• Outeniqua Game Farm - 079 445 2463• Botlierskop Private Game Reserve - 044 333 0021• Bergsig Game Farm - 044 695 1660","html":"• Hartenbos Private Game Lodge - 079 675 2718
• Gondwana Private Game Reserve - 021 555 0807
• Outeniqua Game Farm - 079 445 2463
• Botlierskop Private Game Reserve - 044 333 0021
• Bergsig Game Farm - 044 695 1660"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Indalu Game Reserve - 082 990 3831• Garden Route Safari Camp - 044 001 0098","html":"• Indalu Game Reserve - 082 990 3831
• Garden Route Safari Camp - 044 001 0098"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
